category_title: Students who become bored and disruptive or sleepy during constant lecturing
scenario_title: Plain lecturing without visual aids or discussion
minimal_context: The student is reading from the course book during a plain lecture to complete the assigned chapter.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's open our course books and read the next chapter together.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: We just read from our course books, thus the classes are boring and I don’t like paying attention to the course.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please continue reading the next paragraph.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: The teachers sometimes lecture the classes so boring. When they lecture and pass it, it is not persistent.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's move on to the problems at the end of the reading.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: When the teacher lectures in a plain way, I cannot solve the problems in that course.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's open our course books and read the next chapter together.

STUDENT: We just read from our course books, thus the classes are boring and I don’t like paying attention to the course.

TUTOR: Please continue reading the next paragraph.

STUDENT: The teachers sometimes lecture the classes so boring. When they lecture and pass it, it is not persistent.

TUTOR: Let's move on to the problems at the end of the reading.

STUDENT: When the teacher lectures in a plain way, I cannot solve the problems in that course.

task.content: Reading from course books during a plain lecture that lacks visual aids, discussion, or interpretation.
